subject: Add clamp dashboard charts
commit_message:
Add clamp dashboard charts

Signed-off-by: ac2550 <ac2550@intl.att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 8:

(11 comments)

Thanks for implementing the changes. some more comments.
Could you please provide test results?

Patch Set 8:

There's no test result for this at this time as there's still an issue with the main Clamp (see OOM-920). But here's the deployment

Patch Set 8:

I think it should be ok this time.

Patch Set 9: Verified-1

(1 comment)

I tested with node port changed in my environment to 41 and container comes up and clamp passes health check. Please make change and we can merge.


Basic CLAMP Health Check                                              | PASS |

Patch Set 10: Verified+1

> (1 comment)

Sorry Anael, but it looks like msb stole your node port and had not updated the node port wiki. Port 30290 is available. I have updated the wiki to reflect these changes to both msb and clamp. If you can amend this patch to use 90 as your node port, I will review and merge. Sorry for the back and forth. A free form wiki is not the best place to enforce node port assignments.

Patch Set 11: Code-Review+2 Verified+1
